ows:ServiceIdentification.ows:Title: INSPIRE-WFS Digital Landscape Model 1:250 000
ows:ServiceIdentification.ows:Abstract: INSPIRE Direct Access Download Service for Digital Landscape Model 1:250 000. This service provides from ATKIS DLM250 transformed datasets for the INSPIRE themes Transport Networks, Hydrography (Networks and Physical Water), Administrative Units and Protected Sites. The data provided through this service covers the area of Germany.
ows:ServiceIdentification.ows:Fees: This service can be used free of charge corresponding to the Ordinance to Determine the Conditions for Use for the Provision of Spatial Data of the Federation (Verordnung zur Festlegung der Nutzungsbestimmungen für die Bereitstellung von Geodaten des Bundes – GeoNutzV), as published on 19 March 2013 (Bundesgesetzblatt Jahrgang 2013 Teil I Nr. 14). For more details see: https://sg.geodatenzentrum.de/web_public/gdz/lizenz/geonutzv_eng.pdf. Source reference has to be maintained. | Source reference: © GeoBasis-DE / BKG <year of last data download>

ows:ServiceProvider.ows:ProviderName: Dienstleistungszentrum des Bundes für Geoinformation und Geodäsie
